scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/config build && bun run --cwd packages/registry-client build && bun run --cwd packages/compiler build && bun run --cwd packages/pm build && bun run --cwd packages/formatter build && bun run --cwd packages/linter build && bun run --cwd packages/runtime build && bun run --cwd packages/language-service build && bun run --cwd packages/lsp build && bun run --cwd apps/registry build && bun run --cwd apps/docs build && bun run --cwd apps/cli build && bun run --cwd apps/vscode build
scripts.cloc: bun x --package cloc cloc apps/*/src apps/vscode/syntaxes packages/*/src wiz/types --include-ext=ts,tsx,js,json,wiz,sh,zsh --force-lang='Bourne Again Shell',wiz --force-lang='Bourne Again Shell',zsh
scripts.check: biome check . && bun tools/json-format.ts --check && bun run typecheck && bun test
